title: Google Just Revealed What Comes After AGI And It’s Shocking
summary: A YouTube video discussing Google DeepMind's paper "From AGI to ASI" arguing that AGI may be a starting point rather than an endpoint for AI advancement. The video emphasizes that once human-level AI systems can be copied, accelerated, and networked together to create better AI, the transition to artificial superintelligence (ASI) could be more consequential than AGI itself.
writeup: The video walks through Google DeepMind's paper "From AGI to ASI," which frames artificial general intelligence as a starting point rather than a finish line. The central argument: once human-level AI systems can be copied, run at higher speed, and networked together to build better AI, the path to artificial superintelligence (ASI) opens up. The takeaway is that this AGI-to-ASI transition, driven by recursive self-improvement, could prove more consequential than reaching AGI, raising questions around AI agents and safety.
